resources.title: Apache Arrow project
resources.evidence_quote: Apache Arrow is like an in memory columnar format specification.

resources.title: Apache DataFusion project
resources.evidence_quote: Apache Data Fusion. Right now, it's a subproject of Apache Arrow.

resources.title: Flux community fork

resources.title: HashiCorp license change to BSL
